---
title: "Initial Data Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---
``` {r Load packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(stats)
library(ggplot2)
```

``` {r Load clean data}
clean_data <- read.csv("epd_spd_cleaned.csv")
```

``` {r Create new variables}
clean_data <- clean_data %>% 
  mutate(
    post_shutdown = ifelse(yr == 2025, 1, 0),
    priority_group = case_when(
      priority %in% c(1, 2) ~ "1-2",
      priority %in% c(3, 4) ~ "3-4",
      priority %in% c(5, 6) ~ "5-6",
      priority %in% 7:9     ~ "7-9",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_))
```

```{r}
avg_by_year <- clean_data %>%
  group_by(agency, priority_group) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_response_time = mean(mins_to_arrv, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )
```
